reviews.review_description: Looks and feels like a potential very good game, but due to the lack of instructions and meanings of things I felt not knowing exactly what is going on.

Ok...I have questions. The tutorial shows you what to move and when, however lacks the why or objectives. I have no idea what is happening, there is no explanation. Couldn't find anything on YouTube or online to help at all. I really want to love this, hell...i should love this. Just a little confused currently 🤔

reviews.review_title: Great example of table top Multiplayer
reviews.review_description: Love it! Had a good time playing with 2 people but now I need to get a couple more friends to try 4 player

developer_response.body: Thanks for your great feedback! Please check the latest version which has an improved lobby and it should be easier to find more people to play with!

reviews.review_description: It looks really nice. But if i want invite friends, that doesn't work.

developer_response.body: Hello Pixelbuster, we appreciate so much you bringing this issue to our attention. We have just pushed a fix and we hope you give it another try!

reviews.review_description: My table rises away from me to the ceiling. Cant use the appl.
Really fun, it's great to be able to play a casual game like this with friends!

developer_response.body: Thanks for your review Popup Asylum! We're glad you enjoyed it!
